Setup script for packaging the svg2png tool using py2app.

# Purpose
The `setup.py` script is used to configure the packaging and distribution of a Python application using the `py2app` tool. It specifies the main application script located at `tools/svg2png/svg2png.py` in the `APP` variable, which is the entry point for the application. The `DATA_FILES` list is currently empty, indicating no additional files are included in the package. The `OPTIONS` dictionary contains configuration options for `py2app`, such as enabling `argv_emulation` to allow the application to handle command-line arguments correctly. The `setup` function from the `setuptools` module is called to define the package setup, requiring `py2app` to build the application into a standalone macOS application bundle.
